name: cadence
description: Stack-agnostic, self-improving AI development framework as a Claude Code plugin. Four layers (Patterns, Process, Automated gates, Launch) plus a retrospective loop.

plugins.name: cadence
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic, self-improving AI development framework. Four layers + retrospective loop. Aligned with NIST SSDF v1.1, ISO/IEC 25010:2023, ADR (Nygard), Conventional Commits, SemVer.
